commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared GitHub App installation-token helper, routes account/profile lookups and backup token minting through it, keeps arbitrary trusted-publisher repository lookups on PAT/anonymous auth, and updates generated API types, tests, and specs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR review rather than a standalone bug report. Source inspection and tests cover the intended fallback behavior, but the contributor has not provided real runtime proof of the changed GitHub auth path.
